nano-banana-pro.best_for: Highest quality: hero images, brand art, text-in-image, 2K/4K output. Accepts reference images for editing and character/style consistency.
nano-banana-pro.notes: Nano Banana Pro. Supports resolution 1K/2K/4K via --resolution and aspect ratios up to 21:9.

nano-banana.best_for: Fast, cheap iterations and drafts. Also accepts reference images.
nano-banana.notes: Nano Banana (GA). 1024px-class output; no imageSize control.
